text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems as if it was only a short moment ago that I walked through
those Tracen Academy gates for the first time, yet today marks yet
another beginning!

text_block_list.name: Chief Trainer
text_block_list.text:
How do you do, <username>? I am the chief
trainer of the team you will be joining from this moment on.

text_block_list.name: Chief Trainer
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure how much pep I've got left to keep up with all these
ambitious runners at this age... I do hope that I'm able to impart all
the insight an up-and-coming assistant trainer could need.

text_block_list.name: Chief Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, now that's the spirit! I'm expecting great things from you. I've
actually been keeping an eye on all your efforts. You're here for a
very good reason!

text_block_list.name: Chief Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Enough chatter, though. I want you to meet a real go-getter. Let's go
outside.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
New trainers are placed under the guidance of a veteran. The idea is
to help out and gain experience as a team assistant trainer for a
certain period of time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This team's trainer has been at it for years and is quite renowned. The
time has come for me to meet her newest trainee.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... I've finished with the regimen you passed me this morning, Trainer. What should I do next?

text_block_list.name: Chief Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Well done out there, Bell. I had some partner running planned for you
next, but before that, would you mind? This is our new assistant
trainer we spoke of the other day.

text_block_list.name: Chief Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Well done out there, Bell. I had some partner running planned for you
next, but before that, would you mind? This is our new assistant
trainer we spoke of the other day.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Good day.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Oh, yes... Um... A pleasure to meet you.

text_block_list.name: Chief Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Allow me to formally introduce you, Assistant Trainer. This is
Bell—Mejiro Dober. She is our team's precious star.

text_block_list.name: Chief Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Allow me to formally introduce you, Assistant Trainer. This is
Bell—Mejiro Dober. She is our team's precious star.

text_block_list.name: Chief Trainer
text_block_list.text:
I can only imagine that she will be the final runner under my own
guidance. I've become quite the old lady, haven't I?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Chief Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Oh, just listen to me prattle on. Don't worry about a thing, Bell. I
don't plan on going anywhere just yet, so let's bring a smile back,
okay?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Pardon me. I'm here for some partner running. Are you all ready?

text_block_list.name: Chief Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Oh, yes! Thank you for taking the time, Air Groove. Are you prepared
to start. Bell?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Yes! I'm ready whenever you are.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Mejiro Dober and Air Groove take off down the track as a pair.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove is quite the respectable training partner. Known as the
"Empress," she's followed in her mother's footsteps, having taken
home the second Oaks win for her family.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober has not made her debut yet, but is seemingly having
little problem keeping up.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff... Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Heh, not bad!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The runner displays an important sign of a champion in the
making—an energetic form that begets great speeds. But that's not
all...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Keep going, keep goooing! Aaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Without even considering giving up, she advances ever forward. I'm
very impressed with her show of willpower and competitive spirit.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff... Thank you... very much!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Don't mention it. I must say, Dober—that was quite the showing. Very
impressive speed.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
But even so... I've still much room to improve my positioning and
timing. I wasn't able to overtake you even once...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Haha, well, I don't yield my lead quite so readily. Still, I could
definitely feel your presence creeping ever closer. You're certainly
paired with an excellent trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: That's right!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'm still so very weak, but I have noticed at least a bit of
improvement. I owe all of that to my trainer.

text_block_list.name: Chief Trainer
text_block_list.text: Good, good! That was a wonderful run.

text_block_list.name: Chief Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Oh, what's this? Is that a twinkle in your eyes that I see? I just knew
that you would be one to understand.

text_block_list.name: Chief Trainer
text_block_list.text: Isn't Bell just amazing? She's practically overflowing with talent.

text_block_list.name: Chief Trainer
text_block_list.text:
I do hope I can stand by her and help her realize all of her wildest
dreams, but I'm not sure I—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Um, Trainer? I still have some energy, so would it be okay if I
accompanied Air Groove for some extra training?

text_block_list.name: Chief Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Well now, it looks like someone is feeling extra motivated recently! I
don't see why not, if it's just one more lap or so. Take it a bit slower,
all right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I will. Thank you very much!

text_block_list.name: Chief Trainer
text_block_list.text: As for us, why don't we start cleaning up?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spend a bit more time helping out the chief trainer, thinking the
whole while about how lucky I was to be able to witness such fine
running from Mejiro Dober.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hm? Wait, Dober.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: What is— Ah.

text_block_list.name: Reporters
text_block_list.text: Ryan! Ryan! Please look over here, Mejiro Ryan!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan, you had another terrific race the other day! What do you
have to say to all your fans who are looking forward to your next
race?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Umm... I'm so thankful for all your support! I'll keep training hard to
make sure I live up to all your expectations!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: We'll go back this way. Let's go, Dober.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: All right...
